r4clinstats 0.3.0
  • Get started

  • Functions & data

Package index

Take the course

The functions a learner uses.

learn()
Browse and launch the r4clinstats lessons
check_setup()
Check your R setup for r4clinstats
use_local_library()
Move your R package library out of a synced folder
start_report()
Start your capstone trial report

Datasets

Synthetic, reproducible clinical data used throughout the lessons.

patients
Synthetic clinical-trial patients
labs
Synthetic longitudinal labs
outcomes
Synthetic trial outcomes
linelist
Synthetic messy line list
